name: Australia Post Shipping Setup
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tip", "bold": true}, {"text": ": Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Request a shipping set up"}]}, {"text": " quote."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "These steps will set up the\u00a0public Australia Post rates.\u00a0If you have your own account with eparcel use "}, {"text": "this guide"}, {"text": " instead. To set up Australia Post public shipping rates:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Add New Shipping Option", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image1]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Set Up Shipping Carrier Based Pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and in the pop-up box click "}, {"text": "I Have This Info, Continue Setup", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image2]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Australia Post", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click "}, {"text": "Next Step.", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image3]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter your "}, {"text": "Carrier Account Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " and set your "}, {"text": "Pickup", "bold": true}, {"text": " details. Click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " once complete."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image4]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Choose which services you want to offer. Click "}, {"text": "Show All National Services", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Show All International Services", "bold": true}, {"text": " to see a full list. Click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": " once complete."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image5]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Name your shipping services and give them a description. This information will be visible to customers on your website. Once complete, move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image6]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Set if the shipping options should "}, {"text": "Show To Customers And Staff", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Show To Staff Only", "bold": true}, {"text": " (for creating orders manually). You can also configure if delivery to PO Boxes is available. Once complete, move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": ". To set different options for each service, click the "}, {"text": "Apply Visibility And PO Box Delivery Settings For Selected Services", "bold": true}, {"text": " box. Once complete, click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image7]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can now add a "}, {"text": "Discount Incentive", "bold": true}, {"text": " when a customer orders a certain amount. These are optional, set them if you wish and then move on to the "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image8]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Choose which type of printer you will use to print shipping labels, and click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image9]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Review your settings. You can still make any changes by going back to the relevant section. If you\u2019re happy with the configuration, select "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: image10]"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Complete the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://forms.neto.com.au/services/shippingcarrierlabelsetup.html", "children": [{"text": "Shipping Carrier Label Setup"}]}, {"text": " form and Neto staff will configure your labels as a free service."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For all carrier shipping options we also recommend "}, {"text": "setting backup rates"}, {"text": " in case the carrier\u2019s API suffers an outage."}]}]
